creator: tharada@e-mail.jp
text:
I had an attempt to build openjdk7 using portmaster, then an error occurred described below:
(snip)
===>  Building for openjdk-7.2.13
(snip)
gmake[6]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/build/bsd-i586/hotspot/outputdir/bsd_i486_compiler2/product'
echo Generating precompiled header precompiled.hpp.gch
Generating precompiled header precompiled.hpp.gch
mkdir -p .
/usr/bin/g++ -D_ALLBSD_SOURCE -D_GNU_SOURCE -DIA32 -DPRODUCT -I. -I/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/prims -I/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm -I/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/cpu/x86/vm -I/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/os_cpu/bsd_x86/vm -I/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/os/bsd/vm -I/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/os/posix/vm -I../generated -DHOTSPOT_RELEASE_VERSION="\"22.0-b10\"" -DHOTSPOT_BUILD_TARGET="\"product\"" -DHOTSPOT_BUILD_USER="\"root\"" -DHOTSPOT_LIB_ARCH=\"i386\" -DJRE_RELEASE_VERSION="\"1.7.0_02-b13\"" -DHOTSPOT_VM_DISTRO="\"OpenJDK\"" -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -DTARGET_OS_FAMILY_bsd -DTARGET_ARCH_x86 -DTARGET_ARCH_MODEL_x86_32 -DTARGET_OS_ARCH_bsd_x86 -DTARGET_OS_ARCH_MODEL_bsd_x86_32 -DTARGET_COMPILER_gcc -DCOMPILER2 -DCOMPILER1  -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -pthread -fcheck-new -m32 -march=i586 -pipe -DTARGET_OS_FAMILY_bsd -DTARGET_ARCH_x86 -D
 TARGET_ARCH_MODEL_x86_32 -DTARGET_OS_ARCH_bsd_x86 -DTARGET_OS_ARCH_MODEL_bsd_x86_32 -DTARGET_COMPILER_gcc -DCOMPILER2 -DCOMPILER1 -fPIC -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -pthread -fcheck-new -m32 -march=i586 -pipe -O3 -fno-strict-aliasing  -gstabs -DVM_LITTLE_ENDIAN -Werror -Wpointer-arith -Wconversion -Wsign-compare    -c -MMD -MP -MF ../generated/dependencies/precompiled.hpp.gch.d -x c++-header /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/precompiled.hpp -o precompiled.hpp.gch 
In file included from /usr/include/inttypes.h:33,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/utilities/globalDefinitions_gcc.hpp:83,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/utilities/globalDefinitions.hpp:33,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/utilities/debug.hpp:29,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/runtime/globals.hpp:28,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/memory/allocation.hpp:28,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/memory/iterator.hpp:28,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/memory/genOopClosures.hpp:28,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/oops/klass.hpp:28,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/runtime/handles.hpp:28,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/code/oopRecorder.hpp:28,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/asm/assembler.hpp:28,
                 from /usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/src/share/vm/precompiled.hpp:29:
/usr/include/sys/stdint.h:68:68: error: missing binary operator before token "("
gmake[6]: *** [precompiled.hpp.gch] Error 1
gmake[6]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/build/bsd-i586/hotspot/outputdir/bsd_i486_compiler2/product'
gmake[5]: *** [the_vm] Error 2
gmake[5]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/build/bsd-i586/hotspot/outputdir/bsd_i486_compiler2/product'
gmake[4]: *** [product] Error 2
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/build/bsd-i586/hotspot/outputdir'
gmake[3]: *** [generic_build2] Error 2
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/make'
gmake[2]: *** [product] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk/hotspot/make'
gmake[1]: *** [hotspot-build] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/java/openjdk7/work/openjdk'
gmake: *** [build_product_image] Error 2
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/java/openjdk7.

I also had the same error without using portmaster.

Fix: 

Because I already have installed ports-mgmt/portconf, so that I have added these sentences described below:
java/openjdk7: CFLAGS=-D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS=1
java/openjdk7: CXXFLAGS=-D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS=1
Then I have re-compiled devel/openjdk7 using portmaster. No build error has occurred.
How-To-Repeat: portmaster devel/openjdk7
or 
cd /usr/ports/devel/openjdk7 && make
